description: Order item 3 (load-manifest / loader transformation): CORRECTED per the dynamic-GPTQ-loader addendum. The prior hard-blocker classification was premature (it searched only model-local hooks). The numbered->packed conversion exists at the loader level; the outcome is runtime-path UNRESOLVED, not terminated. Aggregate-only; source inspection + metadata only, no weights.

evidence: transformers 5.13.1 conversion_mapping.py IS a global loader-level weight-conversion layer (WeightConverter / MergeModulelist / Concatenate)

it defines qwen3_5_text with PrefixChange(language_model -> model), and qwen3_5_moe_text = qwen3_5_text + qwen2_moe conversions, i.e. the numbered->packed expert merge + the model.language_model.* prefix rewrite exist at the loader level (my prior model-local-only search missed this)
the GPTQ quantized loader stack (optimum.gptq.GPTQQuantizer.convert_model / GPTQModel Defuser) is NOT installed in this runtime, so quantized strict loadability cannot be exercised or ruled out here

required_runtime_path_audit_remaining: freeze the complete candidate runtime tuple (Transformers build+commit, Optimum, GPTQModel, Defuser, Accelerate, PyTorch, CUDA, kernel backend, dispatch, config classes, loader entry point)
inspect the exact selected path (global conversion mappings, GPTQ convert_model, GPTQModel dispatch, Defuser, QuantLinear replacement, checkpoint loading)

produce an aggregate-only conversion-plan manifest: per numbered expert + each qweight/qzeros/scales/g_idx -> exact target module, shape, dtype, ordering, fusion/defusion op, backend owner; zero ambiguous/missing/extra/duplicated/ignored/synthesized

synthetic production-path fixture on a tiny Qwen3.5-MoE-shaped model through the real pinned loader stack: prove numbered->packed conversion, quant-aux loading, expert ordering, gate/up identity, strict key consumption, deterministic output, and backward behavior

if Transformers+Optimum fails, evaluate the immutable GPTQModel+Defuser route (documented Qwen3.5-MoE support); if every pinned supported route fails -> q35q_quantized_runtime_unavailable with exact identities
then a separate exact-forward + VJP/JVP parity gate (inference loading != autograd admission)
privacy: aggregate-only; representation labels + booleans, no tensor names/values, weights, caches, or local paths
